reason: Backend spec index for agent, skill, sandbox, and orchestration conventions.
Defines the two-layer orchestrator/expert-agent/skill architecture and forbids agent-to-agent calls.
Defines expert agent YAML registration, schema, scoped skills, and registry constraints.
Defines skill package layout, metadata, handler contract, schemas, and test expectations.
Defines sandbox-only external binary execution, whitelist updates, argv validation, and tests.
Defines orchestrator routing behavior and prompt constraints relevant to crawl_web handoff.
Guides bounded summaries versus raw log paths for scanner output.
Guides concise blackboard notes from expert agents.
General backend quality bar and forbidden patterns.
Backend error handling conventions for structured skill failures.
Task-specific integration map, files to edit, patterns, Katana command details, and tests.
